_comment: Remotion plane authoring surface (REMOTION.md). ALL document regions are needs_review until the screen-grabs exist (harvest order in SHOTLIST.md). The B19 ring is the film's show-off beat: the plane demonstrating itself, keyed to the spoken word 'now'. Colors are token names from beat_sheet metadata.
